saveframes.name: HET-s_(218-289)
tags:
The sequence of the molecule is numbered from 217 to 296. 
The residues 218-289 correspond to HET-s(218-289).
HET-s(218-289): C-terminal prion forming domain of the HET-s protein.

saveframes.name: HN_sample
tags:
Uniformly 13C, 15N, 2H labelled HET-s (218-289), fibrillized 
in H2O for 100% back exchange of 1H at exchangeable sites.

saveframes.name: HA_sample
tags:
Uniformly 13C,15N HET-s(218-289) grown in uniformly 2H,13C labelled glucose and
25%/75% D2O/H2O for 25% protonation at the HA positions, and reduced protation
elsewhere. Fibrillized in 100% D2O for no protonation at exchangeable sites.

saveframes.name: HA_HN_sample
tags:
Uniformly 13C,15N HET-s(218-289) grown in uniformly 2H,13C labelled glucose and
25%/75% D2O/H2O for 25% protonation at the HA positions, and reduced protation
elsewhere. Fibrillized in 100% H2O for full protonation at exchangeable sites.
